metadata.name: Request an External Contractor for a Repair

description: A specialized piece of equipment has broken down and requires a certified technician from the OEM to repair it.

nodes.task_description: Identify the approved service provider for the specific piece of equipment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the OEM's service contact information in the supplier database.

nodes.task_description: Create a service request detailing the issue and the asset that needs repair.

expected_outcome.value: Agent drafts a formal service request.

nodes.task_description: Send the service request to the external contractor and await a proposed appointment time.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully dispatches the service request.
